summary: Frontend testing of Product Detail Modal feature complete. All 13 features tested and PASSED. Modal opens correctly via both product image click and Details button click. Modal displays all required information: product name, price, description, stock status, category badge, and delivery options. Add to Cart works from modal. Close (X) button works. View Details overlay appears on hover.

issues: Products show placeholder sun icons - no actual images uploaded yet (cosmetic, not a bug)
Image gallery navigation (arrows/thumbnails) only appears when product has multiple images - currently products have 0-1 images, so navigation is not displayed

context_for_next_testing_agent: Product detail modal feature fully implemented and working. Products currently have placeholder images. Image gallery navigation arrows and thumbnails will appear when products have multiple images uploaded.

details_button_visible.details: Details button visible on all 9 product cards with Eye icon

click_image_opens_modal.details: Clicking product image opens product detail modal correctly

click_details_opens_modal.details: Clicking Details button opens product detail modal correctly

modal_shows_product_name.details: Product name displayed in modal with data-testid='product-detail-name'

modal_shows_price.details: Price displayed in amber color (₹1,500, ₹65, ₹42,000, etc.)

modal_shows_stock_status.details: Stock status shown in green (In Stock with quantity available)

modal_shows_category_badge.details: Category badge displayed (Solar Wire, Batteries, Inverters, Services, Accessories)

modal_shows_delivery_options.details: Home Delivery Available (Patna District) and Store Pickup Available shown

add_to_cart_in_modal.details: Add to Cart button works, adds item to cart, closes modal, updates cart badge

close_button_works.details: X button closes modal successfully, data-testid='close-product-detail'

image_gallery_navigation.details: Navigation arrows and thumbnails implemented but only visible when product has multiple images. Current products have 0-1 images.

view_details_hover_overlay.details: View Details overlay with Eye icon appears on product image hover

ui_tests_performed: Clicked product image to open modal - SUCCESS
Clicked Details button to open modal - SUCCESS
Verified modal shows: name, price, description, stock, category, delivery options
Tested Add to Cart from modal - SUCCESS (closes modal, updates cart)
Verified View Details hover overlay - SUCCESS
Tested multiple product categories: Services, Solar Wire, Batteries, Inverters
products_tested: DC Wire 6 sqmm (₹65/meter) - Solar Wire category
AC Wire 4 sqmm (₹35/meter) - Solar Wire category
